notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy inside-the-park HR
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy hits an inside-the-park home run (5) on a line drive to right-center field.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Cole Carrigg picked off and caught stealing 3rd base, pitcher Paul Skenes to second baseman Brandon Lowe to third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Cole Carrigg plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cole Carrigg hit by pitch. Troy Johnston to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Cole Carrigg out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Cole Carrigg out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Tyler Callihan out at 2nd. Jake Mangum out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Endy Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales hit by pitch. Billy Cook to 2nd.
